title: Signature does not require date in signed headers
description: Similar to the digest issue: server.rs:657-674 checks the Date header freshness (within 5 minutes), but does not verify that 'date' is included in the Signature header's signed headers list. If an attacker can replay a captured request, they can replace the Date header (which was not signed) with a fresh timestamp, bypassing the replay protection entirely while the signature still verifies against the originally-signed headers. The fix is to reject requests where the Signature header's headers= parameter does not include both 'date' and 'digest'. This is an integrity issue: replay attacks on signed requests. Locations: server.rs:657-674 (Date freshness check), signatures.rs:62-63 (signed headers parsed but not validated for required fields).
close_reason: Inbox now requires date in signed headers list
